title: Lines For A Sun-Dial
content:
With shadowy pen I write,
                Till time be done,
            Good news of some strange light,
    Some far off sun.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Alfred Noyes delivers a powerful performance in "Lines For A Sun-Dial"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
